nasb.text: They will eat, but not have enough; They will play the harlot, but not increase, Because they have stopped giving heed to the Lord.

esv.text: They shall eat, but not be satisfied; they shall play the whore, but not multiply, because they have forsaken the Lord to cherish

cnv.text: 他們吃，卻吃不飽； 行淫，人數卻不會增多； 因為他們離棄了耶和華，不遵守他的命令。

ccb.text: 使你们吃却不得饱足， 行淫却不得后代。 因为你们背弃耶和华，
